patch.value: As a third-party package author, I want first-party capability exemplars and pm_min_version models, so that I can copy working patterns for importers/hooks/search and version compat
As a third-party package author, I want first-party capability exemplars and pm_min_version models, so that I can copy working patterns for importers/hooks/search and version compat
importers/hooks/search capabilities each have a tested first-party exemplar; all first-party manifests declare pm_min_version; SDK.md references them

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Partial progress (this PR, branch sdk-package-version-bounds-and-testing-helpers-20260531): (1) all 8 first-party manifests now declare pm_min_version (pm-nf2q closed) — the version-compat model exemplar is done; (2) SDK testing helpers now cover hooks/search-providers/importers/exporters (pm-kfd8 closed). REMAINING for full closure: real first-party CAPABILITY exemplars for importers/hooks/search — tracked by pm-13bn (importer/exporter migration) and pm-bqpg (search-provider exemplar). Finding from pm-kfd8: NO first-party package currently registers an importer/exporter/search-provider/hook (only commands/flags/services), so those two items are the remaining exemplar work. Keeping this story open until pm-13bn/pm-bqpg land.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Progress (this PR): importers exemplar (pm-13bn: todos/beads registerImporter/registerExporter) and search exemplar (pm-bqpg: pm-search-advanced 'search-advanced-local' SearchProvider) both CLOSED, and the SDK foundation pm-7qjk (first-class importer/exporter registration metadata) shipped. SDK.md now references both first-party exemplars. REMAINING for full closure: the HOOKS third of the acceptance — no first-party package registers a lifecycle hook yet. Tracked by new follow-up pm-s40s (kept narrow/low-risk because hooks run on every matching lifecycle event in auto-loaded packages). Keeping pm-izsi OPEN until pm-s40s lands; all first-party manifests already declare pm_min_version (pm-nf2q).

author: codex-continue-sdk-cli
message: Claim parent story for closure after pm-s40s completed hooks exemplar acceptance.

patch.value: Closed after pm-s40s added pm-lifecycle-hooks as the hooks exemplar; prior related work had already closed importer/exporter and search exemplars plus pm_min_version coverage.
Package authors can copy working first-party patterns for importers/hooks/search and version compatibility from docs and tests.

Docs identify pm-beads/pm-todos, pm-lifecycle-hooks, and pm-search-advanced exemplars; tests verify package manifests, importer/exporter/search/hook registration, catalog/install-all behavior, and package-first dogfood.
Acceptance complete: importers, hooks, and search each now have tested first-party exemplars; first-party manifests declare pm_min_version; SDK and extension docs reference package-author patterns.

author: codex-continue-sdk-cli
message: Release claim after parent package-author exemplar story closure.
